title.en: However, Ye Tian would not explain to it, and d...

content.en:
Soon, Ye Tian's second copy body came to the territory of the reincarnation purple gold centipede again.

At this time, the reincarnation purple gold centipede appeared again, and after seeing Ye Tian, it showed a shocked look.

"Why aren't you dead?"

The reincarnation purple gold centipede still has some wisdom, and it is very puzzled that Ye Tian is not dead.

However, Ye Tian would not explain to it, and directly killed the other party.

Thundered!!!!

As time passed, Ye Tian's replica body couldn't hold on again, but this reincarnation purple gold centipede was also hit hard.

"Die!"

The reincarnation purple gold centipede once again urged the supreme divine power of reincarnation, and countless purple poisonous mist hands penetrated Ye Tian's body, blasting the severely injured Ye Tian to death, but Ye Tian, the replica body, used all its strength to burst out the ruin spear before he died, which also made his injuries even more serious.

After the reincarnation purple gold centipede killed Ye Tian's replica body, he was ready to return to the lair to recover from his injuries.

However.

Airplanes!!!!

Another replica body of Ye Tian came.

Seeing this scene, it was completely dumbfounded.

It didn't want to kill Ye Tian anymore and was ready to escape.

However, Ye Tian used the Reincarnation Flow Body Technique to chase after him, and easily caught up with the heavily injured Reincarnation Purple Gold Centipede.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian and this reincarnation purple gold centipede continued to fight.

The heavily injured reincarnation purple gold centipede was naturally not Ye Tian's opponent, and was quickly killed by Ye Tian.

"This reincarnation purple gold centipede is really hard to kill!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently, he searched for treasure resources in the territory of the reincarnation purple gold centipede.

There are really a lot of resources here, all kinds of precious resources have been discovered by Ye Tian, and he has also found a reincarnation purple gold vein in the lair of the reincarnation purple gold centipede.

This kind of reincarnation purple gold is also a material that can refine the reincarnation treasure, and how precious a vein is, it can refine many reincarnation treasures!

It can be said that this reincarnation purple gold vein alone is enough to make the reincarnation celestial clan crazy!

Ye Tian took some time to mine this reincarnation purple gold vein, and then sent it to the other replica bodies.

After a period of time, Ye Tian had almost found the resources on the territory of the Reincarnation Purple Gold Centipede, and he was ready to continue to go deep into the depths of the Reincarnation Purple Abyss.

Next, he encountered several creatures whose strength was no less than that of the Reincarnation Purple Gold Centipede, all of which sacrificed a replica body to severely damage it, and then killed it, gaining a lot of resources.

......

Reincarnation in the depths of the purple abyss.

Ye Tian came to a place of incomparably silence.

At this moment, there was a dangerous aura in the darkness.

He knew it was going to be dangerous.

Suddenly.

A black giant ape appeared, the other party's hair was very long, and the whole body seemed to be wrapped in countless black hairs, which looked more like a fluffy thing from the outside.

But Ye Tian really saw that this was a black giant ape.

In a flash.

The black giant ape slapped it in the face.

Ye Tian wanted to urge the reincarnation flow technique to escape, but this palm directly blocked the surroundings, and even Ye Tian couldn't get rid of the blockade, so he could only watch this palm descend.

【Purple Abyss Black Ape】

This is the information that Ye Tian spied on.

Click!!!

Ye Tian's duplicate body was directly smashed with a palm, and he had no backhand.

......

"It's terrifying, that Purple Abyss Black Abyss is definitely the Nine-Time Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and it's not an ordinary Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, it is estimated to be the top at this level!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

Such a Origin Upper Realm Overlord, even if he provoked countless times, he was slapped to death by a slap, and he couldn't use the copy body to accumulate and consume the other party.

"Explore the rest of the world, avoid this area!"

Ye Tian decided.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to explore other areas, and once he encountered a creature comparable to the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, he directly chose to give up.

There is no way, the gap between his current strength and the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords is too great.

Compared to the Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords and the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, the difference in strength is simply worlds apart.

The gap between the two is simply bigger than the gap between the five Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords and the eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

Not to mention a replica body, even if all the replica bodies are combined, it is far from being an opponent when it cooperates with the battle array.

Before you know it, dozens of primeval epochs have passed.

Ye Tian has been staying in the Reincarnation Purple Abyss, and the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan is also extremely worried, and it has also been summoned many times, Ye Tian replied one by one, which made them breathe a sigh of relief.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian was ready to leave the Reincarnation Purple Abyss, he had already obtained a large amount of resources from the Reincarnation Purple Abyss, and had offended several creatures comparable to the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, the other party had already come out from the depths of the Reincarnation Purple Abyss and swept away the members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan.

After all, this time, Ye Tian killed a lot of eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, so naturally he couldn't hide it.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian is ready to run away!

Wow!

A figure flew out of the reincarnation purple abyss, and it was Ye Tian.

After coming out, he breathed a sigh of relief.

"In a short period of time, the reincarnation Ziyuan shouldn't be able to go!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Not long after Ye Tian came out, several Origin Upper Realm Overlord creatures comparable to the Nine Awakenings slaughtered the members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan on the periphery of the Reincarnation Purple Abyss with a large number of creatures, not a single one remained, and they also tried to rush out.

Thundered!!!!

Poison Ancestor and the other nine awakening Origin Upper Realm overlords took action to suppress it, and it took a little time to suppress this group of reincarnation Purple Abyss creatures.

......

Reincarnation of the ancient mountain.

Yazu: They are discussing the matter of reincarnation Ziyuan.

"Just now, the reincarnation of the purple abyss erupted, and a group of creatures rushed out, and the dozen or so seventh-time awakening Origin Upper Realm and one eight-time Awakening Origin Upper Realm overlord who remained inside all fell. Yazu said.

Such a loss was not small, and it made him a little annoyed.

"Is Ao Chen okay?" asked Junzu.

"Aochen is fine!" Yazu shook his head, "He rushed out in time, it should be relatively close to the exit, so it's okay." "

However, the initiator was Ye Tian.

If they knew, they would be absolutely angry.

"Next, no members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan will be allowed to enter the Reincarnation Purple Abyss!"

These Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords gave this order.

And Ye Tian was also instructed, but he didn't care, he wouldn't go anyway.

"It's too big to take back this time!!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

He was going to give all the resources to his true body copy body after a while, and there was no need for this Ao Chen copy body to continue to improve rapidly, just cultivate slowly.
